interpretation: C&G targeted stress tests. Source/site grouping is available for SPT only; CPT is event-grouped because source/site identifiers are not present in the processed public table. Gains are reported against an out-of-fold logistic calibration of the published mechanistic margin, so positive values indicate recoverable information beyond the margin under the specified validation protocol.
model_fairness_checks: source-study and site grouped SPT sensitivity
